failedAssertions.title: Concurrent first requests for one user collapse onto one VM assignment
failedAssertions.reason: Fix commit 2e1a9a8 is NOT working. 5 concurrent requests created 3+ distinct VMs for same user instead of collapsing to one. All VM boots fail with 'truncate data image: no such file or directory'. Concurrent request collapsing mechanism is NOT functioning.

details.vmBootError: truncate data image /var/lib/go-choir/vm-state/.../data.img: no such file or directory
details.rootCause: VM state directory creation fix (commit 2e1a9a8) is not taking effect; pendingWaiters mechanism not preventing duplicate VMs

previousFix.message: Fix vmmanager: create VM state directory before data image

appliedUpdates.description: Updated VAL-VM-004 with Round 6 findings: fix commit 2e1a9a8 is not working, 3+ VMs created for same user, concurrent collapsing mechanism not functioning

deploymentStatus.commitMessage: Fix vmmanager: create VM state directory before data image

fixAttempt.claimedFix: Create VM state directory before data image
fixAttempt.actualResult: NOT WORKING - data.img creation still fails with 'no such file or directory'
fixAttempt.analysis: The fix may not be deployed correctly, or the directory creation is happening in the wrong location/timing in the code path

discoveredIssues: pendingWaiters mechanism not preventing duplicate VM creation during concurrent requests
VM state directories exist with epoch files but no data.img (creation order issue)
System falls back to static placeholder sandbox, masking VM routing failures
verifiedWorking: Gateway end-to-end flow (VAL-GATEWAY-001 - passed in Round 5)
All gateway HTTP assertions (VAL-GATEWAY-002 through 008 - passed in prior rounds)

vmBootIssue.currentSymptom: Firecracker boot failed: create data image ... truncate data.img: no such file or directory
vmBootIssue.fixAttempt: Commit 2e1a9a8 added MkdirAll before data image operations
vmBootIssue.actualBehavior: Fix is not taking effect - error persists exactly as before
possibleReasons: Fix not deployed to Node B (CI/CD lag)
Fix in wrong code path (vmmanager.go vs vmctl.go)
Directory creation happening after data.img path construction but before truncation
NixOS build using cached binary without the fix

concurrentCollapse.expected: Single VM per user via pendingWaiters mechanism
concurrentCollapse.actual: 3+ VMs created for same user during 5 concurrent requests
concurrentCollapse.evidence: vmctl logs show multiple VM creation attempts with same user ID
concurrentCollapse.rootCause: pendingWaiters mutex/channel mechanism has race window allowing duplicate VM creation

notes: Round 6 re-run after fix commit 2e1a9a8 'Fix vmmanager: create VM state directory before data image'
VAL-VM-004 FAILED - fix is NOT working
5 concurrent requests created 3+ VMs for same user (vm-6e7afcf..., vm-78e320..., vm-3a72a7...)
All VM boots fail with 'truncate data image: no such file or directory' - same error as before fix
System falls back to static placeholder sandbox (sandbox-m1) masking VM routing issues
0 of 1 retested assertions passing (0% success rate for this round)
Validation complete: 27 of 28 gateway-vm assertions passed overall, 1 remaining failure (VAL-VM-004)
recommendations: Verify fix commit 2e1a9a8 is actually deployed on Node B (check git log, verify binary)
Investigate why MkdirAll in vmmanager.BootVM is not creating directories before data.img truncation
Fix pendingWaiters race condition: consider sync.Cond or stricter mutex scope around check-assign-boot sequence
Add explicit logging at directory creation and data.img truncation points for debugging
Consider disabling static placeholder fallback temporarily to force VM routing and expose issues
After fixes are confirmed working, re-run VAL-VM-004 to verify concurrent collapsing
